name: stale-content-digest

env.COMMENT: PROJECT_ID, DATASET, SLACK_OAUTH_TOKEN, and SLACK_CHANNEL are required. Optional: DAYS_SINCE (default 180), STUDIO_URL (enables deep-links to the document in Slack), NOTIFY_WHEN_EMPTY ('true' to post a message even when nothing is stale).

exampleInstructions: Add this resource to your Blueprint config's resources array. The function runs every Monday at 08:00 UTC and needs a robot token with read access. See README.md for full setup.
